title: Billing & Polar
subtitle: Connect Polar to power subscriptions — configure tokens, webhook secrets and the active environment.
generalHint: Enable billing and choose which Polar environment is live.
enabledHint: When off, checkout and the pricing CTAs are disabled.
activeModeHint: Checkout and the customer portal use this environment's token and product IDs.
webhookUrlHint: Add this URL as a webhook endpoint in your Polar dashboard. Sandbox and production each need their own endpoint and secret.
replaceHint: Enter a new value to replace
vaultWarning: SENTROY_ENV_MASTER_KEY is not configured — secrets cannot be encrypted or stored.
dashSubtitle: Manage your company's plan and subscription.
actionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pastDueWarning: Your last payment failed. Update your payment method to keep your plan.
billingSetupHint: Paid plans aren't purchasable yet. Under Admin → Billing, turn on "Billing enabled" and make sure the active environment matches the Polar product IDs you mapped to each plan.
downgradeNote: Cancel your current plan to move back to Free.
yearlyHint: Want to offer yearly billing? Set a yearly price and yearly product IDs on your plans.
